title: Portable Agent Protocol Workflow Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating the YAML front-matter of .agent/workflows/*.md

name.description: Unique, machine-readable name of this workflow.

steps.description: List of execution steps forming the Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG).

id.description: Unique, machine-readable identifier of this workflow step.

tool.description: The name of the PAP skill/tool to execute for this step.

action.description: The name of the built-in runtime action to execute (e.g., 'remember', 'respond').

depends_on.description: Step IDs that this step directly depends on and must wait for.

params.description: Arbitrary key-value parameters passed to the tool or action. Supports jinja-like string interpolation.
